header.gameSetup.handMulligan.you: You can <discard>discard your hand</discard> or <pass>keep it</pass>
header.gameSetup.handMulligan.player: {player} can discard their hand or keep it
header.gameSetup.territoryToken.you: You must place a territory token on the border of the central landscape
header.gameSetup.territoryToken.player: {player} must place a territory token on the border of the central landscape
header.chooseAction.you: You can perform <adaptation><adaptationSymbol /> adaptation</adaptation>, <evolution><evolutionSymbol /> evolution</evolution> <expansion><expansionSymbol /> expansion</expansion> or <pass>pass</pass>
header.chooseAction.player: {player} can choose which action to perform or pass
header.expansionAction.chooseCube.you: You must place a cube on the expansion slot of your board
header.expansionAction.chooseCube.player: {player} must place a cube on the expansion slot of their board
header.expansionAction.placeToken.you: You must place a territory token on a <biotope/> hex on the Central Landscape
header.expansionAction.placeToken.player: {player} must place a territory token on a <biotope/> hex on the Central Landscape
